synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-1833 Oracle Linux 10 nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1833
description:
[2.2.57-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.57
- Use global DNS even for static IP with static DNS. (RHEL-126738)
- Add libreswan leftprotoport and rightprotoport support. (RHEL-130914)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-1833

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-1833.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
nmstate-2.2.57-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nmstate-devel-2.2.57-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nmstate-libs-2.2.57-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
nmstate-static-2.2.57-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
python3-libnmstate-2.2.57-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
nmstate-2.2.57-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nmstate-devel-2.2.57-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nmstate-libs-2.2.57-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
nmstate-static-2.2.57-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
python3-libnmstate-2.2.57-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/nmstate-2.2.57-1.el10_1.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[2.2.57-1]
- Upgrade to 2.2.57
- Use global DNS even for static IP with static DNS. (RHEL-126738)
- Add libreswan leftprotoport and rightprotoport support. (RHEL-130914)
